title: Kid and Law Challenge Big Mom
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on Sanji, Unknown person #9, Queen, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12 as The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.
scene: The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Didn't you use it against King earlier?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You vanished into thin air! That must be thanks to judge's tech, right?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: ...huh? something's definitely up with my body...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Hurry up!! Put it on, Vinsmoke!!*

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't call me that!! You don't understand what happened between me and my fami-!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No, they aren't even family!! I'm not wearing that crappy suit!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There has to be something I can do... His dinosaur hide is insanely tough.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: For a regular kick, that was impressive!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Fine, if that's how you want it, I'll stick to showing you the unaltered. Raw power of a dinosaur!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: The sovereign beasts that ruled the world...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's coming!! The true power of an ancient beast!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 26 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
